languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of Tech-Priests often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of Mars, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

languages.text: "Нет, не все. Одеяния {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецов{/g} часто разнятся от миру к миру — они пронизаны символизмом, отражающим принципы конкретной ветви технодуховенства. Красный — цвет {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Марса{/g}, он присутствует в одеяниях каждого мира как дань уважения Красной Планете. Белый символизирует чистоту машин и священную аугментику".

traits.locale_text: "Нет, не все. Одеяния {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецов{/g} часто разнятся от миру к миру — они пронизаны символизмом, отражающим принципы конкретной ветви технодуховенства. Красный — цвет {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Марса{/g}, он присутствует в одеяниях каждого мира как дань уважения Красной Планете. Белый символизирует чистоту машин и феррум санктум".

"No, not all. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

languages.text: «No, nada más lejos de la verdad. Las túnicas de los {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdotes{/g} suelen variar en cada mundo; están cargadas de un simbolismo que refleja los principios de cada rama particular del tecnosacerdocio. El rojo es el color de {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Marte{/g} y está presente en todas las túnicas en honor al Planeta Rojo. El blanco simboliza la pureza de las máquinas y los sagrados aumentos».
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

traits.locale_text: «No, nada más lejos de la verdad. Las túnicas de los {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdotes{/g} suelen variar en cada mundo; están cargadas de un simbolismo que refleja los principios de cada rama particular del tecnosacerdocio. El rojo es el color de {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Marte{/g} y está presente en todas las túnicas en honor al Planeta Rojo. El blanco simboliza la pureza de las máquinas y los sagrados aumentos».

languages.text: “不，不全是。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的长袍往往因世界而异，因为它们被赋予了象征意义，反映着机械修会各个分支的教义原则。红色代表{g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}火星{/g}，每个世界的长袍上都有红色，以此向那颗红色星球致敬。白色则象征着机械与神圣植入物的纯净。”
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

traits.locale_text: “不，不全是。{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}的长袍往往因世界而异，因为它们被赋予了象征意义，反映着机械修会各个分支的教义原则。红色代表{g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}火星{/g}，每个世界的长袍上都有红色，以此向那颗红色星球致敬。白色则象征着机械与神圣植入物的纯净。”

languages.text: « Non, pas du tout. Les robes des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtres{/g} varient généralement d'un monde à l'autre ; elles sont imprégnées d'une symbolique reflétant les principes d'une branche particulière de technoprêtrise. Le carmin est la couleur de {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, on le trouve sur les robes de chaque monde en hommage à la planète rouge. Le blanc représente la pureté des machines et des augmétiques sacrés. »
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

traits.locale_text: « Non, pas du tout. Les robes des {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtres{/g} varient généralement d'un monde à l'autre ; elles sont imprégnées d'une symbolique reflétant les principes d'une branche particulière de technoprêtrise. Le carmin est la couleur de {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, on le trouve sur les robes de chaque monde en hommage à la planète rouge. Le blanc représente la pureté des machines et des augmétiques sacrés. »

languages.text: "Nein, nicht alle. Die Roben von {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriestern{/g} sind von Welt zu Welt verschieden ... beseelt von einem Symbolismus, der die Prinzipien des jeweiligen Zweiges der Techpriesterschaft widerspiegelt. Rot ist als Farbe des {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g} in den Roben aller Welten als Hommage des Roten Planeten vertreten. Weiß steht für die Reinheit der Maschinen und heiligen Augmentationen."
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

traits.locale_text: "Nein, nicht alle. Die Roben von {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriestern{/g} sind von Welt zu Welt verschieden ... beseelt von einem Symbolismus, der die Prinzipien des jeweiligen Zweiges der Techpriesterschaft widerspiegelt. Rot ist als Farbe des {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g} in den Roben aller Welten als Hommage des Roten Planeten vertreten. Weiß steht für die Reinheit der Maschinen und heiligen Augmentationen."

languages.text: 「いいえ、すべてではありません。技術司祭のローブは世界によって異なることが多い。技術司祭団の特定の支部の原則を反映する象徴が込められているのだ。赤は火星の色であり、赤い惑星へのオマージュとして各世界のローブに存在する。白は機械の純粋さと神聖なオーグメティックを象徴する。」
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、すべてではありません。技術司祭のローブは世界によって異なることが多い。技術司祭団の特定の支部の原則を反映する象徴が込められているのだ。赤は火星の色であり、赤い惑星へのオマージュとして各世界のローブに存在する。白は機械の純粋さと神聖なオーグメティックを象徴する。」

languages.text: "Hayır, hepsi giymez. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahiplerin{/g} cübbeleri genellikle dünyadan dünyaya değişir. Tekno Rahipliğin belirli bir dalının ilkelerini yansıtan sembolizmle doludurlar. Kırmızı; {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}'ın rengidir, Kızıl Gezegen'e saygımızı göstermek için her dünyanın cübbesinde bulunur. Beyaz, makinelerin ve kutsal ogmetiklerin saflığını simgeler."
languages.original_text: "No, not all. The robes of {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priests{/g} often vary from world to world — they are imbued with symbolism that reflects the principles of a particular branch of the tech-priesthood. Red is the colour of {g|Encyclopedia:MarsGlossary}Mars{/g}, it is present in the robes of each world as an homage to the Red Planet. White symbolises the purity of machines and sacred augmetics."
